name: diffbir
description: ✨DiffBIR: Towards Blind Image Restoration with Generative Diffusion Prior

background_upsampler.description: For 'faces' mode: Model used to upscale the background in images where the primary subject is a face.
background_upsampler.title: background_upsampler

background_upsampler_tile.description: For 'faces' mode: Size of each tile used by the background upsampler when dividing the image into patches.
background_upsampler_tile.title: Background Upsampler Tile

background_upsampler_tile_stride.description: For 'faces' mode: Distance between the start of each tile when the background is divided for upscaling. A smaller stride means more overlap between tiles.
background_upsampler_tile_stride.title: Background Upsampler Tile Stride

color_fix_type.description: Method used for color correction post enhancement. 'wavelet' and 'adain' offer different styles of color correction, while 'none' skips this step.
color_fix_type.title: color_fix_type

disable_preprocess_model.description: Disables the initial preprocessing step using SwinIR. Turn this off if your input image is already of high quality and doesn't require restoration.
disable_preprocess_model.title: Disable Preprocess Model

face_detection_model.description: For 'faces' mode: Model used for detecting faces in the image. Choose based on accuracy and speed preferences.
face_detection_model.title: face_detection_model

guidance_repeat.description: For 'general_scenes': Number of times the guidance process is repeated during enhancement.
guidance_repeat.title: Guidance Repeat

guidance_scale.description: For 'general_scenes': Scale factor for the guidance mechanism. Adjusts the influence of guidance on the enhancement process.
guidance_scale.title: Guidance Scale

guidance_space.description: For 'general_scenes': Determines in which space (RGB or latent) the guidance operates. 'latent' can often provide more subtle and context-aware enhancements.
guidance_space.title: guidance_space

guidance_time_start.description: For 'general_scenes': Specifies when (at which step) the guidance mechanism starts influencing the enhancement.
guidance_time_start.title: Guidance Time Start

guidance_time_stop.description: For 'general_scenes': Specifies when (at which step) the guidance mechanism stops influencing the enhancement.
guidance_time_stop.title: Guidance Time Stop

has_aligned.description: For 'faces' mode: Indicates if the input images are already cropped and aligned to faces. If not, the model will attempt to do this.
has_aligned.title: Has Aligned

input.description: Path to the input image you want to enhance.
input.title: Input

only_center_face.description: For 'faces' mode: If multiple faces are detected, only enhance the center-most face in the image.
only_center_face.title: Only Center Face

reload_restoration_model.description: Reload the image restoration model (SwinIR) if set to True. This can be useful if you've updated or changed the underlying SwinIR model.
reload_restoration_model.title: Reload Restoration Model

repeat_times.description: Number of times the enhancement process is repeated by feeding the output back as input. This can refine the result but might also introduce over-enhancement issues.
repeat_times.title: Repeat Times

restoration_model_type.description: Select the restoration model that aligns with the content of your image. This model is responsible for image restoration which removes degradations.
restoration_model_type.title: restoration_model_type

seed.description: Random seed to ensure reproducibility. Setting this ensures that multiple runs with the same input produce the same output.
seed.title: Seed

steps.description: The number of enhancement iterations to perform. More steps might result in a clearer image but can also introduce artifacts.
steps.title: Steps

super_resolution_factor.description: Factor by which the input image resolution should be increased. For instance, a factor of 4 will make the resolution 4 times greater in both height and width.
super_resolution_factor.title: Super Resolution Factor

tile_size.description: Size of each tile (or patch) when 'tiled' option is enabled. Determines how the image is divided during patch-based enhancement.
tile_size.title: Tile Size

tile_stride.description: Distance between the start of each tile when the image is divided for patch-based enhancement. A smaller stride means more overlap between tiles.
tile_stride.title: Tile Stride

tiled.description: Whether to use patch-based sampling. This can be useful for very large images to enhance them in smaller chunks rather than all at once.
tiled.title: Tiled

upscaling_model_type.description: Choose the type of model best suited for the primary content of the image: 'faces' for portraits and 'general_scenes' for everything else.
upscaling_model_type.title: upscaling_model_type

use_guidance.description: Use latent image guidance for enhancement. This can help in achieving more accurate and contextually relevant enhancements.
use_guidance.title: Use Guidance
